steps.t: Halnith has sighted smoke rising from a lit camp-fire in Makham Mijann. You should investigate. Makham Mijann is located to the north of Nendath.
You have found a dying Corsair hiding in a tent at Makham Mijann. You should talk to him.
There is nothing you can do for the dying Corsair, but he has asked you to take his war-hound Kakhât with you. You should approach Kakhât.
You should return to Halnith at Nendath with your new companion. Nendath stands to the south of Makham Mijann.
You should tell Halnith what you found at Makham Mijann. She stands guard at Nendath.
